text.title: Web Scraping Patterns
text.summary: Element extraction, pagination handling (next/infinite-scroll/load-more), concurrency limiting, and schema validation.

rule.statement: Define a JSON Schema or Zod schema for the extracted data before writing the extractor; validate every extracted row against the schema and skip/log invalid rows.
rule.rationale: LLMs invent field names not present in the source HTML; a schema makes invalid extractions visible immediately rather than silently producing bad data.

rule.statement: Use p-limit or a custom semaphore to cap concurrent page instances at 3-5; close each page in a finally block.
rule.rationale: Uncapped page creation OOMs the host; each Chromium page consumes ~50-100MB RAM.
